name: Inoviq Ltd
analysis: IIQ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (4.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.3450. Trade idea: entry A$0.5350, stop A$0.2920, target A$1.2639 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
